title: fragaria sylvestris
intro: Fragaria sylvestris, also known as wild strawberry or Alpine strawberry, is a species of strawberry native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Fragaria sylvestris include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Fragaria sylvestris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
